data.title: What's Going On With Lululemon (LULU) Stock?
data.description: Lululemon Athletica shares dipped 2% Friday morning. The stock fell following Nike's second-quarter earnings report and strategic pivot under its new CEO, Elliott Hill.

data.title: Nvidia Secures EU Approval For Run:ai Deal, US Probes China Export Breach
data.description: EU approves Nvidia's acquisition of Run:ai, an Israel-based provider of GPU orchestration software. Nvidia aims to integrate it into its ecosystem.

data.title: Joby Aviation Enters Final FAA Certification Phase, Shares Take Off
data.description: Joby Aviation stock rises after announcing entry into the final phase of FAA certification for its electric air taxi.

data.title: Nebraska Attorney General Sues UnitedHealth Over Massive Data Breach That Disrupted Healthcare
data.description: Nebraska Attorney General sues UnitedHealth Group and affiliates over a data breach impacting 575,000 residents, alleging law violations and mishandled response.

data.title: Mission Produce, Nvidia, Humacyte, BlackBerry And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
